results.rendered_html:
bandhin (von bandh) adj. am Ende eines comp.
1〉 bindend, fangend; s. dṛḍhabandhinī, matsyabandhin.
— 2〉 bewirkend, hervorrufend: rajobhirantaḥpariveṣavandhi līlāravindaṃ bhramayāṃ cakāra  RAGH. 6,13 . rāga˚ (bhoga) 18,18 . zeigend, äussernd: vātsalya˚ (hṛdaya)  VIKR. 147 .
— Vgl. phala˚.
